channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Inman: 49ers’ Lynch quietly launches a message Faithful won’t want to hear
item.description: General manager John Lynch said the 49ers must "reset" and "recalibrate" their spending habits, presumably excluding Brock Purdy's eventual contract extension.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Seahawks' Geno Smith seemingly agrees with Republican governor on property tax idea
item.description: Seattle Seahawks quarterback Geno Smith appeared to agree with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis on the notion of abolishing property taxes. He made a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Detroit Lions offensive coordinator takes another ‘playful’ jab at Jared Goff
item.description: Former Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson's "joking" remarks about Jared Goff will motivate both franchises during the upcoming season, as they play each other twice a year.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Ref reports 'Die' chants made at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio in Copa semifinal
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Real Sociedad fans chanted “Die” at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio during the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinals on Wednesday, the match referee said in his report.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL free agency: Top quarterbacks available from starters to bridge options
item.description: The 2025 NFL free agency market has the potential to offer quarterback-needy teams some viable options ahead of the draft in April.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR stars enjoy immersive Mexico City visit ahead of first international Cup Series race
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Daniel Suarez led a quartet of NASCAR stars through the streets of Mexico City, after midnight, in search of a nightcap following a full day of showcasing his native country to his fellow competitors.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Girls Soccer: Bonita Vista 2, Torrey Pines 1
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Girls Open Division semifinals Bonita Vista Barons on track to repeat if with a win playing at Torrey Pines on Wednesday night. Falcons lead 1-0, but then Bonita Vista scored on a penalty kick that Ava Gavlan ripped to the net to tie the match at 1.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 7 St. John’s tops Butler 76-70 to clinch share of 1st Big East regular-season title in 33 years
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — RJ Luis Jr. scored 24 points and No. 7 St. John’s clinched a share of its first Big East regular-season title in 33 years by beating Butler 76-70 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS GOFF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hoosiers use late surge to beat Penn State 83-78
item.description: BLOOMINGTON, Ind. (AP) — Oumar Ballo had 20 points, 12 rebounds and five assists, Myles Rice scored 11 of his 13 points in the second half and Indiana beat Penn State 83-78 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: PHL 17

item.title: Shaedon Sharpe makes a case for the best dunk in the NBA this season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Shaedon Sharpe has been one of the NBA's most gifted young dunk artists since he was selected seventh overall by the Portland Trail Blazers in the 2022 NBA draft. But he reached a new level on Wednesday night — possibly literally.
item.dc:creator: IAN NICHOLAS QUILLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tre Holloman's midcourt buzzer-beater could propel Michigan State to a Big Ten title
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman hadn't even reached the “M” logo at midcourt when he jumped off one foot and let the ball fly. Somehow, it stayed on line before dropping through the hoop with a swish that reverberated across the Big Ten.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Orleans Privateers player suspensions related to possible gambling violations, AP source says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Four New Orleans players who've been suspended since late January are under investigation for possible NCAA violations related to sports gambling, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL reviewing possible changes to overtime rules. First downs to be measured electronically
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The NFL is considering changing overtime rules in the regular season to decrease the advantage for teams that win the coin toss. “It’s time to rethink the overtime rule,” league executive Troy Vincent said Wednesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA legend Diana Taurasi epically trolled NBA star during 2016 Olympics: report
item.description: WNBA legend Diana Taurasi reportedly roasted Golden State Warriors star forward Draymond Green for his lack of offensive prowess during the 2016 Olympic Games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Bucks guard hit with lawsuit from female fans after launching basketball at them during playoff game
item.description: Patrick Beverley is being sued by the two women he chucked a basketball at during his Milwaukee Bucks' playoff loss to the Pacers last season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Maine lawmaker censured for posting picture of trans student on Facebook
item.description: (NewsNation) — A state representative in Maine was censured by other members of the legislature after posting a picture of a trans teen girl on her public Facebook page. The resolution passed 75-70 in a party-line vote, the Portland Press-Herald reported. Per Maine House rules, Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic's Mavericks reunion was 'so weird.' He still gets a triple-double and a W for the Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Although Luka Doncic speaks four languages, he struggled for the words to express just how strange it was to play against the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lionel Messi strikes early, Inter Miami beats Sporting KC 3-1 to advance in Champions Cup
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi opened the scoring with a masterful strike in the 19th minute, and Inter Miami beat Sporting Kansas City 3-1 on Tuesday night in the second leg of the CONCACAF Champions Cup’s first round.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Poles, Johnson detail 'clear vision' for Bears heading into NFL Scouting Combine
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to upgrade their offensive line and add a pass rusher in the upcoming NFL Scouting Combine, while also evaluating their running back and tight end positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC wins inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0
item.description: San Diego FC dominated its inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0 in the 30th MLS season, scoring its first-ever goal in the 52nd minute.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Rodriguez makes half-court shot, wins Bucknell student $10,000
item.description: Former Major League Baseball star Alex Rodriguez showed his skill on the hardwood Sunday, making a half-court shot to win a Bucknell student $10,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Soccer: Westview 3, Eastlake 1
item.description: Open Division girls soccer match between Westview and Eastlake to see who goes on to the next round of playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch San Diego FC's inaugural game this weekend
item.description: San Diego FC is set to make its highly-anticipated regular season debut on Sunday with an away match against the Los Angeles Galaxy.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — When they played “O Canada” for the second time, there were no American fans left in the arena to boo.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4
